name: Celebration Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mixes according to package instructions for round cakes.
2. Cool the cakes for 5-7 minutes, then remove from pans and cool completely.
3. Place each cooled cake on a baking sheet and freeze uncovered until firm, about 2 hours.
4. Prepare the pineapple filling by beating whipping cream and vanilla in a chilled bowl until stiff. Fold in crushed pineapple (well drained).
5. Split the cakes to make 4 layers. Place one chocolate layer rounded side down on a plate; drizzle with 2 teaspoons of rum if using.
6. Spread about 1/3 of the pineapple filling over the rum.
7. Repeat with one banana layer and another chocolate layer.
8. Top with the remaining banana layer, rounded side up.
9. Prepare the frosting mix according to package instructions and frost the top and sides of the cake.
NOTE: The Celebration Cake can be made up to 1 month in advance. It should be filled, wrapped, and frozen unfrosted until ready to serve. Thawing takes about 5 hours, but you can frost and decorate the cake before it is completely thawed.
